proof.note_line_total_not_used_for_operational: Operational cost derives from unit_price (€/kg), not line_total/qty. line_total/qty_kg = weighed effective rate; line_total/operational_denominator_g ≠ €/kg because denominator is per-priced-kg (1000g), not purchased weight.

allRows.name: Farina do pasta fresca e gnocchi

verdict.question: Would hiding Operational Cost change recipe costing, intelligence, pricing history, or operational calculations?
verdict.answerText: For all four Emporio deli family products, procurement and operational €/kg are mathematically identical. Recipe costing uses recipeOperationalCostFieldsFromInvoiceLine (current_price=unit_price, purchase_quantity=1000, cost_base_unit=g) yielding the same €/kg as procurement display. Hiding Operational Cost on ingredient detail removes no computation input; presentation-only duplicate.
